kickoff_pipeline.message: Kickoff: map the existing Streamlit app behavior into a legacy flow inventory and parity matrix for migration to Next.js + FastAPI.
Kickoff: define migration scope, priorities, release slices, and testable acceptance criteria based on the legacy flow map.
Kickoff: validate product workflows against real organizer/operator operations and identify edge cases and fallback paths.
Kickoff: design the target architecture for Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, Neo4j DBMS, Redis workers, CI/CD, and observability.
Kickoff: define graph domain model, constraints/indexes, and critical Cypher query patterns for production usage.
Kickoff: perform pre-implementation security review for architecture and data model; provide prioritized remediation requirements.
Kickoff: define data minimization, consent, retention, access, and auditability guardrails for the migration plan.
Kickoff: propose contract-first API boundaries and FastAPI implementation plan with Neo4j repository layer and Redis worker interfaces.
Kickoff: propose Next.js (TypeScript + Tailwind) frontend architecture and critical UX states aligned with backend contracts.
Kickoff: define Docker/CI-CD/runtime plan with Sentry, health checks, and rollback procedures for reliable production delivery.
Kickoff: define end-to-end QA and release gating strategy across API, UI, workers, and regression coverage.
Kickoff: consolidate all outputs into a bounded plan, gate status matrix, and prioritized implementation backlog.
